specs.title: cp-000: tiptapToDocx converter renders bibliography under section heading References
cp-001: tiptapToDocx renders images as plain text Image alt src image
cp-002: tiptapToDocx renders bullet list items with Unicode bullet prefix u2022
cp-003: tiptapToDocx renders checked task items with u2611 and unchecked with u2610
cp-004: tiptapToDocx renders citation superscripts at 18 half-points 9pt font size
cp-005: Chat API Zod schema limits messages array to maximum 50 items
cp-006: Chat API applies rate limiting via RATE_LIMITSai
cp-007: Chat API selects getGuideSystemPrompt only when mode learn AND both guideContext
cp-008: Chat API selects getDraftSystemPrompt only when mode draft AND draftContextinten
cp-009: Chat API returns streaming response via resulttoTextStreamResponse
cp-010: Referencetype accepts 9 values article book chapter website guideline conference
cp-011: Reference interface includes optional fields not surfaced in any UI pmcid url pu
cp-012: CSLItem interface supports an open key string unknown index signature for arbitr
cp-013: GuideContext interface includes optional fields not used in Studio UI targetJour
cp-014: REPORTING_GUIDELINES for review_article includes Narrative review best practices
cp-015: REPORTING_GUIDELINES for book_chapter academic_draft and letter are all empty ar
cp-016: Slash menu heading commands display shortcut badges as CmdShift1 through CmdShif
cp-017: Slash command Block Quote displays a CmdShiftB shortcut badge in the menu
cp-018: Slash command Divider displays a CmdShiftEnter shortcut badge in the menu
cp-019: Slash command Code Block displays a CmdOptC shortcut badge in the menu
cp-020: TopBar save status timestamp refreshes on a 30-second interval via setInterval 3
cp-021: TopBar word count button has titleClick for section breakdown
cp-022: TopBar section breakdown popover closes on mousedown outside event not click
cp-023: TopBar mode dropdown uses a fixed inset-0 z-40 overlay as click-catcher behind t
cp-024: TopBar reference badge button title is References comment badge button title is

cp-026: Citation dialog detects PMID queries by checking if query is 1-8 digits only reg
cp-027: Citation dialog identifier detection banner is a clickable full-width button rea
cp-028: Citation dialog DOIPMID resolution switches the active tab to doi before resolvi

cp-030: Citation dialog DOI-tab error message for network failures is Network error Plea
cp-031: Citation dialog DOI-tab error message for resolution failures is dataerror Could
cp-032: Editor page pending citation notice with a paper title reads Saved title to your
cp-033: Editor page pending citation notice without a title reads Paper saved to your li
cp-034: Editor page pending citation notice auto-dismisses after 5000ms 5 seconds not 25
